FILE_STATUS_CD: Numeric operational status code for a roster operation lifecycle event.
FILE_STATUS_CD_9: Stopped: pipeline halted before successful completion.
FILE_STATUS_CD_45: DART Review: file is awaiting or undergoing DART review.
FILE_STATUS_CD_49: DART Generation: file is in DART generation stage.
FILE_STATUS_CD_99: Resolved: file reached terminal resolved state.
LATEST_STAGE_NM: Most recent pipeline stage observed for the roster operation.
FAIL_REC_CNT: Records that fail due to system or processing errors.
REJ_REC_CNT: Records rejected due to validation or compliance violations.
SKIP_REC_CNT: Records skipped due to deduplication or business rules.
TOT_REC_CNT: Total records contained in a provider roster file.
SCS_PCT: Percentage of successfully processed records in a roster file.
RUN_NO: Processing attempt number; values greater than 1 indicate retry or reprocessing runs.
FIRST_ITER_SCS_CNT: Transactions successful on the first processing attempt in market metrics.
FIRST_ITER_FAIL_CNT: Transactions failed on the first processing attempt in market metrics.
NEXT_ITER_FAIL_CNT: Transactions still failing after retry iterations.
OVERALL_SCS_CNT: Total successful transactions after combining first and subsequent iterations.
OVERALL_FAIL_CNT: Total failed transactions after combining first and subsequent iterations.
SCS_PERCENT: Overall market transaction success percentage across all iterations.
MARKET: State or region-level market grouping used in aggregated operational metrics.
MONTH: Reporting month key used for trend and cross-table correlation.
LOB: Line of Business such as Medicare, Medicaid HMO/FFS, or Commercial PPO/EPO.
MEDICARE: Government insurance line of business for eligible senior/disabled populations.
MEDICAID_HMO: Managed Medicaid line of business with health-plan specific processing rules.
MEDICAID_FFS: Fee-for-service Medicaid line of business often requiring state-specific compliance handling.
COMMERCIAL_PPO: Commercial Preferred Provider Organization line of business.
COMMERCIAL_EPO: Commercial Exclusive Provider Organization line of business.
SRC_SYS: Source system that submitted or produced the roster payload.
AVAILITYPDM: AvailityPDM source system typically associated with payer-provider data submissions.
DEMOGRAPHIC: Source feed focused on provider demographic and profile updates.
PROVIDERGROUP: Source feed associated with provider group-level roster submissions.
SPS_LOAD: Final stage where validated records are loaded into the downstream system.
DART_GENERATION: Stage where provider data is transformed into DART format for downstream processing.
DART_REVIEW: Operational review stage for generated DART output before validation and load.
DART_UI_VALIDATION: Validation stage where DART content is checked through UI or automated rules.
ISF_GENERATION: Stage where intermediate structured files are produced for transformation and validation.
MAPPING_APPROVAL: Stage where submitted source fields are aligned with internal data models.
PRE_PROCESSING: Initial ingestion and preparation stage for incoming roster files.
IS_STUCK: Flag indicating a roster operation is stalled in a pipeline stage.
IS_FAILED: Flag indicating a roster operation has failed and did not complete successfully.
IS_STUCK_VS_IS_FAILED: IS_STUCK indicates in-progress stall, while IS_FAILED indicates terminal failure condition.
FAILURE_STATUS: Free-text status describing why a roster operation failed or stalled.
COMPLETE_VALIDATION_FAILURE: Failure mode where records fail broad validation checks, often from schema or rule mismatches.
GREEN: Healthy stage performance; duration and quality indicators are within expected thresholds.
YELLOW: Warning stage performance; metrics are elevated and may require monitoring.
RED: Critical stage performance; operational intervention is typically required.
AVG_DART_GENERATION_DURATION: Historical baseline for DART generation duration used to detect anomalies.
AVG_PRE_PROCESSING_DURATION: Historical baseline for pre-processing duration used in anomaly detection.
AVG_MAPPING_APROVAL_DURATION: Historical baseline for mapping-approval duration used in anomaly detection.
AVG_DART_REVIEW_DURATION: Historical baseline for DART review duration used in anomaly detection.
AVG_SPS_LOAD_DURATION: Historical baseline for final SPS load duration used in health scoring.
